meaning: n.无太平门的建筑物,易失火的建筑物
examples: This old Building is a definite firetrap.
The hotel have no fire escape it a real firetrap.
Human vultures who ran sweatshop factories in firetrap tenements were all too willing to take crippled workers.
Republic began selling denim clothing in Leeds in 1986 and since then has grown to supply both men and women with clothing brands including G-Star, Diesel and Firetrap.
